name: Chicken Adobo in Coconut Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot, sauté garlic and onion in 2 tablespoons olive oil.
2. Add chicken pieces to the pot along with 2 cups of coconut milk, black pepper, salt, ginger, and vinegar.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered until the chicken is very tender (about 1 hour and 10 minutes).
4. Stir in the remaining coconut milk and chili (optional for added heat and spiciness). Simmer for an additional 2 to 3 minutes until the sauce thickens and becomes oily.
5. Serve over hot rice.
